prompt: Professional minimalist flat design icon representing zero sugar and no jitters. Sugar cube with a prohibition circle-slash over it OR a clean leaf symbol representing natural and sugar-free. Geometric clean lines, pure flat solid colors in orange (#d74f1d) and white. Isolated on completely transparent background. 512x512. High fidelity vector icon. No shadows, no 3D. Flat design only.
negative_prompt: realistic photograph, 3D render, photorealistic, blurry, low quality, cartoon, hand-drawn, painted, watercolor, textured, gradients, shadows, depth effects, complex details
